name: sky-shards
description: Sky Shards — многопользовательская браузерная 3D-игра в жанре survival-roguelike (Three.js + Socket.IO + Cannon.js)

scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace client run typecheck
